mapper.sql: AA.RAW_SEQ , AA.RAW_NAME , AA.PROD_COMPANY , AA.PROD_COUNTRY , AA.SUPPLIER , AA.WEIGHT , AA.USE_YN , AA.RGTR , AA.RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , AA.CHNG_DTTM

FF.RAW_DETAIL_SEQ , FF.RAW_SEQ , FF.MEMB_SEQ , FF.TITLE , FF.HASHTAG , FF.FILE_ID , FF.RAW_DESC , FF.RAW_DETAIL , FF.VIEW_CNT , FF.REQUEST_CNT , FF.RGTR , FF.RGT_DTTM , FF.CHNR , FF.CHNG_DTTM , FF.DLTR , FF.DLT_DTTM

RR.RAW_REQUEST_SEQ , RR.RAW_DETAIL_SEQ , RR.PTN_SEQ , RR.PTN_NAME , RR.PHONE , RR.EMAIL , RR.ADDRESS , RR.REQ_DETAIL , RR.STATUS , RR.MESSAGE_TYPE , RR.RGTR AS REQUEST_RGTR , TO_CHAR(RR.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as REQUEST_DATE

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.RAW_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.PROD_COMPANY), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.PROD_COUNTRY), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.raw.mapper.RawDAO.getRequestTypeList */
SELECT RP.RAW_REPLY_SEQ , RP.DISPATCH_CODE , RP.DISPATCH_DATE , RP.REF_SEQ , RP.REPLY_CMT_ORD , RP.CONTENTS , RP.RGT_DTTM , MI.MEMB_NAME , MI.PTN_SEQ , PP.PTN_NAME FROM T_RAW_REQUEST_REPLY RP INNER JOIN T_RAW_REQUEST RR ON RP.RAW_REQUEST_SEQ = RR.RAW_REQUEST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MEMB_INF MI ON RP.RGTR = MI.MEMB_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN T_PARTNER_INF PP ON MI.PTN_SEQ = PP.PTN_SEQ
RP.RAW_REQUEST_SEQ = #{rawRequestSeq , jdbcType=INTEGER} AND RP.DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY RP.RAW_REPLY_SEQ ASC, RP.REF_SEQ ASC, RP.REPLY_CMT_ORD ASC
